stem: Which of the following combination of approaches should a team lead take to have a highly motivated and high-performing project team? (Choose three)
options: A.Build strong relationships, Provide context to work and the big picture, Implement customized incentives.
B.Ensure team peer review is done, Emphasize on team performance management, Prioritize individual rewards
C.Emphasize on team dynamics, Plan and deliver regular training on team dynamics, Hold regular team building activities
D.Foster a competitive environment, Prioritize reward for team member excellence, Hold regular team meetings
explanation: Competitive environments don't help with motivation and high performance for all team members.
